# Python-generated files
__pycache__/
*.py[oc]
build/
dist/
wheels/
*.egg-info

# Virtual environments
.venv

# Environment & secrets
.env

# SQLite runtime database
data/*.db

# GNN model checkpoints (large binaries)
gnn/checkpoints/
gnn/*.pth

# Testing
.pytest_cache/

# OS junk
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Internal docs (not for repo)
prd.md
neo4j.txt
